event5.text: Which is rude of the universe, honestly.

event7.text: Relay pack is blinking like it wants attention.

event12.text: I'm putting it on my back.

event18.text: That was a lie. I'm less fine.

event20.text: But moving beats waiting for the station to invent new ways to be creepy.

backgroundEvent21.text: If I stop typing, I'm not ignoring you. I'm either using both hands or trying not to scream. Fun range.

event3.text: It is heavier than it looks.

event5.text: Which is impressive because it looks like a portable regret machine.

event7.text: I'm in the lower access spine.

event9.text: There are two emergency strips left. One is flickering. The other is trying its best.

event14.text: Not because I enjoy breathing. Although, yes. Big fan.

event16.text: Because if the crew records lied, life support might not.

background8.text: Hold on. Cable on the floor. I'm stepping over it. If I trip, you saw nothing.

event11.text: He called himself Head of Not Dying.

event15.text: I would like to hate it again.

event17.text: Rivera fixed things by insulting them until they worked.

event19.text: Park made jokes when he was scared. Owens laughed only when she thought nobody could hear.

event26.text: On a station where nobody could print anything.

event28.text: He found a way to make digital ink feel judgmental.

event33.text: I went somewhere else for a second.

event0.title: CREW MANIFEST
event0.content:
01 Ethan Hale
02 Maya Chen
03 Grant Walker
04 Rivera Torres
05 Owen Park
06 Sarah Owens
event0.caption: Recovered official ECHO crew manifest.

event6.text: Very official. Very calm. Very suspicious.

background9.text: Something just clicked behind the wall. Probably temperature shift. Probably. I am putting that word on trial later.

event12.text: Hale's old control route is closer.

event14.text: I know which one I'd pick if I wasn't trying to survive.

event7.text: Basically anything that could kill you politely.

event14.text: Bad men are easier when they are bad at their jobs.

event3.text: Open is not the same as welcoming.

event9.text: Faster gets me there before my courage notices.

event11.text: Quieter means I spend more time listening to myself breathe.

event5.text: Why not take the big haunted hallway.

background11.text: Moving. Fast. Head down. Not looking into the rooms. Rooms can mind their business.

busy.message: [MAYA IS MOVING THROUGH THE MAIN CORRIDOR]

event5.text: Tiny metal tunnel full of cables and regret.

background8.text: I'm in. Helmet scraped the ceiling. Dignity did not survive.

background9.text: Cable touched my neck. I handled it with maturity and absolutely did not make a noise.

event3.text: Do not ask how fast I moved.
If anyone asks, I was graceful.

event8.text: Found something under the cable tray.

event9.title: GRANT'S SECURITY TAG
event9.content:
DAMAGED ID TAG
NAME: GRANT WALKER
ACCESS: SECURITY / LOWER SPINE
STATUS: OFFLINE
NOTE: Impact scoring along edge.
event9.caption: Maya recovered Grant Walker's damaged security tag in the maintenance crawl.
event9.message: [GRANT'S SECURITY TAG ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event14.text: He would be very annoyed that I got sad in a vent.

event16.text: So I'm choosing to be annoyed too.

event7.text: Of course Hale made a backup for the backup.

event14.text: Or scan first and pretend we are sensible people.

event3.text: I hate how decisive that sounded.

event10.text: This is going to be loud.

event5.text: Responsible adults in a nightmare tube.

event7.text: Reader says the seam is hot near the latch.

event10.text: Pressure kicked the hatch back into my hand.

event21.text: I can know that and still be mad.

event7.text: There was pressure trapped behind the seam.

event9.text: If I'd forced it, my hand would've had a short but dramatic career.

event3.text: It is colder than the corridor.

event5.text: How is a room colder than a dead hallway?

event9.text: Please do not answer with physics.

event10.title: LIFE SUPPORT ALLOCATION
event10.content:
ECHO LIFE SUPPORT SNAPSHOT

Assigned crew capacity: 6
Active biometric loads before blackout: 7
Oxygen adjustment event: automatic
Unauthorized load marker: removed from index
event10.caption: Recovered life support allocation record. Crew count mismatch detected.
event10.message: [LIFE SUPPORT ALLOCATION ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event22.text: Life support says seven bodies were breathing.

event27.text: I need you to be very careful with what you ask me next.

choice1.text: ASK IF SHE KNEW ABOUT SEVEN.

event3.text: That landed exactly where it hurts.

event9.text: And yes, I know how useful that answer is from the only living person in the room.

event12.text: But now that you made me look at the gap...

event16.text: Like a room in my head where the door was painted over.

event18.text: I hate you a little for asking.

event3.text: Close is a suspicious word now.

event9.text: Suit prep means walking past the racks.

event12.text: I know what's probably still hanging there.

background6.text: I am not looking at the name tags.

background7.text: I looked at one name tag.

background11.text: Decon lights still cycle. Blue. White. Blue. White. Like it thinks cleaning matters.

event12.text: Because apparently my survival strategy is emotional vandalism.

event3.text: The decon room smells like metal and old antiseptic.

event5.text: I used to hate that smell.

event7.text: Right now it means the room still remembers how to be a room.

event5.text: But barely is today's version of generous.

event6.title: EVA SUIT REGISTRY
event6.content:
ECHO EVA SUIT REGISTRY

SUIT-01: ETHAN HALE
SUIT-02: MAYA CHEN
SUIT-03: GRANT WALKER
SUIT-04: RIVERA TORRES
SUIT-05: OWEN PARK
SUIT-06: SARAH OWENS
SUIT-07: ENTRY ERASED

Registry repair failed.
event6.caption: Recovered EVA suit registry. Seventh suit slot exists but identity is erased.
event6.message: [EVA SUIT REGISTRY ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event15.text: Even I can hate that math.

event16.title: MANIFEST_V2
event16.content:
01 Ethan Hale
02 Maya Chen
03 Grant Walker
04 Rivera Torres
05 Owen Park
06 Sarah Owens
07 █████████

Layer status: identity erased, not redacted.
event16.caption: Recovered alternate manifest layer. Seventh entry erased.

event22.text: Redacted means someone hid a name.

event24.text: Erased means someone tried to kill the place where the name lived.

event17.text: I don't know that I don't know it.

choice0.text: ASK WHERE SHE SAW THE NAME.

event3.text: The part where I become easier to blame than the dark.

event7.text: A person can answer back. A missing name can't.

event14.text: But if I die while you decide whether I'm guilty, I am haunting your interface.

event7.text: ETHAN HALE WAS NOT THE FIRST VOICE.

event13.text: Ask the archive what spoke before Hale.

event15.text: And if I go quiet after this...

choice1.text: ASK MAYA ABOUT THE FIRST VOICE.
